headline: How The Amphenol (APH) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And Fair Value Assumptions
summary: Amphenol’s updated fair value estimate now stands at US$178.39 per share, compared with the previous US$169.44, putting fresh focus on where price targets are settling. Recent Street research has split between analysts raising targets on confidence in execution and those trimming or tempering shorter term conviction after reassessing growth and margin assumptions. As you read on, you will see how these moves fit together and what to watch to keep up with the evolving story around the...

headline: Twilo's Q1 Earnings Surpass Expectations, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: TWLO beats Q1 2026 estimates with 20% revenue growth and strong earnings, while raising full-year guidance on improved growth and profitability outlook.

headline: The downstream winners of the AI trade's latest phase
summary: Jackson Square Capital managing partner Andrew Graham takes a magnifying glass to the state of the AI trade — as the latest batch of Magnificent Seven earnings came out this week — and the factors that are creating "downstream winners" like Dell Technologies (DELL).

headline: 5 Stock Picks Last Month From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: US stocks jumped, S&P 500 settles above 7,200 level. April saw best month for stocks in months. Benzinga's Analyst Ratings API can help traders outperform market, top analysts picks revealed.
